reference: While brushing my teeth a week ago, I slipped and jammed my toothbrush into my left lower gum, on the tongue side, just below my back two teeth. It has gotten worse, and I cannot chew on that side. Yesterday, it hurt from my eye down to my throat. What have I done? How do I fix it?
text: Brush up my teeth with them. I slip and drop my toothbrushes on my pillow on the couch tonight. It's not in words. Yesterday, I forgot how to do it. How many times?
